title: Shrink
description: Shrink is a small mod for Minecraft that allows players to change their player's size.
body:
Shrink is a small mod that lets you change your player's size.

  • By shrinking, you gain access to places that would normally be off-limits without breaking blocks. 
  • The mod introduces a single item called the Personal Shrinking Device.
  • When you shift-right-click this device, your player magically shrinks down to about the size of a quarter of a block.
  • The Personal Shrinking Device requires power from any RF/Forge Energy source, although you can disable this feature in the configuration file.

Use Cases

  •  Imagine infiltrating secret passages, exploring tiny nooks, or even hiding from mobs as a minuscule adventurer. 
  • Need to slip through a narrow gap? Shrink! - Want to experience the world from a bug's perspective? Shrink!
  • Tired of towering over everything? Shrink!
  • While small, you'll still pack a punch. Your tiny self can wield mighty weapons and armor.
  • Be cautious some mobs might not appreciate your newfound compactness.
